series_metadata.series_description: Complaints and all related investigation documents involving architects, landscape architects, and / or firms. May include preliminary investigative documents. Does not include official Board actions such as final Orders.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 5 years after end of investigation and closing of matter, then destroy ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years after end of investigation and closing of matter, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
